name: Kick-Off Nachos
recipeIngredient: 1 can Campbell's condensed Cheddar Cheese Soup (10 3/4 oz)
2 cans Early California Ripe Olives, pitted and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 1/2 quart saucepan, combine the soup and salsa. Heat over low heat, stirring often until heated through.
2. Serve the mixture over tortilla chips. Top with chopped tomato, sliced green onions, and olives.
Serves 6.
TIP: If desired, warm the chips in the microwave. Divide the tortilla chips between two microwave-safe plates. Microwave one plate at a time, uncovered, for 1 1/2 minutes.
